title: Project Identity
content: Pioneer Trader is a FastAPI algorithmic trading backend for the Citadel Omega ecosystem. It connects to MEXC spot exchange, provides JWT-secured REST APIs for trade execution, and includes the T.I.A. (Tactical Intelligence Agent) risk control system. Default mode is PAPER (no real trading). GitHub: DJ-Goana-Coding/pioneer-trader. HF Space: huggingface.co/spaces/DJ-Goana-Coding/pioneer-trader. Port: 10000.

title: Backend Structure
content: The FastAPI application lives in backend/main.py. Core modules: config.py (Pydantic Settings), security.py (JWT auth), logging_config.py, personas.py, iso20022_parser.py, yield_engine.py. Routers: auth, telemetry, cockpit, security, finance, hub_router, brain, trade, strategy. Services: vortex.py (sync CCXT), exchange.py (async CCXT), strategy_engine.py, tia_agent.py, admiral_engine.py, tia_admiral_bridge.py, garage_manager.py, malware_protection.py, archival.py, redis_cache.py, oms.py.

title: Health Endpoints
content: GET /health returns {status: ONLINE} with no auth. GET /ready returns {status: READY, usdt: float} after touching MEXC exchange. GET /v1/hub/health returns the configured Mapping Hub URL. These are safe to poll without credentials.

title: Auth Endpoints
content: POST /auth/login accepts {username, password} JSON and returns {access_token, token_type: bearer}. GET /auth/me returns the current authenticated username. Tokens use HS256 JWT, expire in ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES (default 30). Required env vars: ADMIN_USERNAME, ADMIN_PASSWORD, SECRET_KEY.

title: Cockpit Endpoints
content: The /cockpit/* router is the T.I.A. command center. GET /cockpit/status returns T.I.A. risk level, Admiral capabilities, and Vortex balance. POST /cockpit/authorize lets T.I.A. grant Admiral premium access. POST /cockpit/tia/consume feeds AEGIS snapshots (wallet_balance, total_equity, active_slots). GET /cockpit/garage/status shows Genesis Garage bay. All cockpit endpoints are public (no JWT required).

title: Hub Sync Endpoints
content: POST /v1/ingest forwards a JSON payload to the Mapping & Inventory Hub at /v1/ingest. POST /v1/query forwards a query to /v1/query. The hub URL defaults to https://dj-goana-coding-mapping-and-inventory.hf.space and can be overridden via MAPPING_HUB_URL env var. These are the RAG sync connection points.

title: Security & Archival Endpoints
content: GET /security/status reports RedFlagScanner state. POST /security/scan scans code strings for malicious regex patterns (eval, exec, os.system, DROP TABLE, XSS). POST /security/archival/log-trade logs a trade to the JSONL shadow archive at SHADOW_ARCHIVE_PATH (/tmp/shadow_archive by default). GET /security/archival/session returns session win/loss/win-rate stats.

title: T.I.A. Agent
content: TIAAgent (backend/services/tia_agent.py) analyzes system risk from AEGIS snapshots. Risk scoring: wallet_balance < 10 USDT adds 0.4, active_slots > 12 adds 0.3, equity down 30%+ adds 0.5. Thresholds: score >= 0.6 = HIGH, >= 0.3 = MEDIUM, else LOW. When HIGH, Admiral premium access should be restricted. State persists to Redis key tia:state with 1-hour TTL. Gracefully falls back to in-memory if Redis unavailable.

title: Admiral Engine
content: AdmiralEngine (backend/services/admiral_engine.py) gates capabilities. Base capabilities (always on): basic_trading, telemetry, portfolio_view. Premium capabilities (T.I.A.-controlled): sniper_execution, vortex_control, strategy_override, risk_clamp_control, trailing_stop_config, slot_scaling, airgapped_sync. Use cockpit /authorize and /revoke endpoints to control.

title: VortexOmega Engine
content: VortexOmega (backend/services/vortex.py) is the lightweight synchronous CCXT MEXC wrapper used directly in main.py. Methods: get_balance(), execute_trade(symbol, side, amount), monitor_market(symbol). Uses env vars MEXC_API_KEY and MEXC_SECRET. Note: runs synchronously — blocking calls. For async use, ExchangeService in backend/services/exchange.py should be preferred.

title: Exchange Service
content: ExchangeService (backend/services/exchange.py) is the full async CCXT MEXC wrapper. Supports PAPER mode (fake orders), TESTNET (falls back to PAPER — MEXC has no testnet), and LIVE mode (requires credentials). PAPER mode returns fake order dicts. LIVE mode validates credentials before initialising. Methods: fetch_ohlcv, fetch_ticker, fetch_balance, create_order, create_market_buy.

title: Redis Cache
content: RedisCache (backend/services/redis_cache.py) provides portfolio state, peak price tracking (for trailing take-profit), trade history (last 100 trades), and ticker caching. All methods gracefully return None/empty if Redis is unavailable. Uses decode_responses=True. Connects to REDIS_URL (default: redis://localhost:6379). Can be disabled via REDIS_ENABLED=False.

title: Malware Protection
content: RedFlagScanner (backend/services/malware_protection.py) scans code strings and API request data for malicious patterns including: eval(), exec(), __import__, os.system, subprocess, rm -rf, DROP TABLE, <script, javascript:. Matched content is isolated in memory with SHA256 hash. Scanner can be disabled via ENABLE_MALWARE_PROTECTION=False.

title: Hub Router
content: hub_router.py is the thin synapse connecting this node to the Mapping & Inventory Hub. It proxies POST /v1/ingest and POST /v1/query to the Hub's corresponding endpoints. Default hub URL: https://dj-goana-coding-mapping-and-inventory.hf.space. Override with MAPPING_HUB_URL env var. Timeout: 30 seconds (MAPPING_HUB_TIMEOUT). Returns 502 if hub unreachable.

title: Environment Variables
content: Required secrets: ADMIN_PASSWORD, SECRET_KEY (>=32 chars). For LIVE trading: MEXC_API_KEY, MEXC_SECRET. For HF sync: set HF_TOKEN in GitHub Actions secrets. Optional: EXECUTION_MODE (default PAPER), REDIS_URL, ALLOWED_ORIGINS, MAPPING_HUB_URL. Full reference in .env.example and PIONEER_TRADER_KNOWLEDGE.md section 6.

title: Bug Fix: MEXC_KEY typo
content: FIXED (2026-04-19): backend/services/vortex.py was calling os.getenv('MEXC_KEY') but the environment variable is named MEXC_API_KEY everywhere else (config.py, .env.example, exchange.py, strategy_engine.py). This silently prevented the API key from loading, causing all LIVE mode trading to fail. Fixed to os.getenv('MEXC_API_KEY').

title: Bug Fix: get_current_user missing alias
content: FIXED (2026-04-19): backend/core/security.py only defined get_current_admin but routers/telemetry.py, routers/trade.py, routers/brain.py, and routers/strategy.py all imported get_current_user (which did not exist). This would cause ImportError when those modules were loaded. Fixed by adding get_current_user = get_current_admin alias in security.py.

title: Bug Fix: Auth router not mounted
content: FIXED (2026-04-19): backend/core/security.py declares OAuth2PasswordBearer with tokenUrl='/auth/login', but the auth router (backend/routers/auth.py) was not included in backend/main.py. This made POST /auth/login return 404, making the entire JWT auth system non-functional. Fixed by registering auth_router in main.py with import guard.

title: Bug Fix: Telemetry, Cockpit, Security routers not mounted
content: FIXED (2026-04-19): Three fully-implemented router modules (telemetry, cockpit, security) were defined but never mounted in backend/main.py. All their endpoints were returning 404. Fixed by registering all three routers in main.py with individual import guards.

title: Bug Fix: README described wrong project
content: FIXED (2026-04-19): README.md had HF Space metadata for 'UI Stencil Pack' (sdk: docker, app_port: 7860, emoji: rocket) and described a front-end web components library. The actual project is a FastAPI trading backend. Fixed by replacing README with accurate Pioneer Trader documentation including correct app_port: 10000.

title: Known Issue: trade.py and strategy.py routers not mounted
content: backend/routers/trade.py and backend/routers/strategy.py are not mounted in main.py because they depend on app.state.oms, app.state.exchange_service, and app.state.strategy_engine which are never initialised in a lifespan handler. To fix: add a FastAPI lifespan context manager in main.py that initialises ExchangeService, OMS, and StrategyEngine into app.state on startup.

title: Known Issue: ATO coefficients file is empty
content: config/ato_coefficients.json exists but contains only empty/stub data. The YieldEngine in backend/core/yield_engine.py always returns status=PENDING_COEFFICIENTS until real ATO postcode zone data is populated. The POST /v1/finance/analyze endpoint always warns about this.

title: Known Issue: VortexOmega uses sync CCXT in async app
content: backend/services/vortex.py uses the synchronous ccxt library (not ccxt.async_support). Methods fetch_balance, create_order, fetch_ticker block the asyncio event loop. For production load, replace with the async variant already used in backend/services/exchange.py.

title: Deployment: HuggingFace Space
content: The .github/workflows/hf_sync.yml workflow automatically pushes to the HF Space on every push to main. Requires HF_TOKEN secret in GitHub Actions. The Space uses Docker SDK with app_port 10000. The uvicorn CMD in Dockerfile is: uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 10000.

title: Deployment: Docker
content: Dockerfile uses python:3.12-slim. WORKDIR /app. Copies requirements.txt first for layer caching. Then copies all files. EXPOSE 10000. CMD: uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 10000. Build: docker build -t pioneer-trader . Run: docker run -p 10000:10000 --env-file .env pioneer-trader

title: Persona Registry
content: Four personas defined in backend/core/personas.py: TIA (Captain, green, triggers: status/report/tia/system), GOANNA (DJ, purple, triggers: bass/vibe/play), VOID (Oracle, red, triggers: truth/dark/prediction), HIPPY (Guide, blue, triggers: peace/chill/love). The SkinWalkerBrain service switches persona based on trigger words in messages.

title: Ecosystem Connections
content: Pioneer Trader connects to: (1) MEXC exchange via CCXT. (2) Mapping & Inventory Hub at /v1/ingest and /v1/query for RAG sync. (3) Vercel HUD at https://citadel-nexus-private.vercel.app — whitelisted in CORS. (4) Redis for state persistence. (5) HuggingFace Spaces for deployment. (6) GitHub Actions for CI/CD.

title: Naming Convention Note
content: The GitHub organization handle is DJ-Goana-Coding (single-n). The persona character name is 'DJ Goanna' (double-n). HF Space URLs use the single-n org handle: dj-goana-coding-pioneer-trader.hf.space. Internal persona code uses GOANNA (double-n) as the ID. This is intentional — no bug.

title: Standardised System Status Endpoint
content: GET /v1/system/status is the standardised QGTNL fleet telemetry contract (PHASE 2.2). No auth required. Returns: node identity (pioneer-trader), status (ONLINE), version (v1), execution_mode (PAPER/LIVE), exchange (MEXC), routers_loaded (list of router tags), services (init state of exchange_service/oms/strategy_logic), and hub_url (configured Mapping Hub). Vercel HUD polls this for centralised telemetry. Every node in the QGTNL fleet must implement this endpoint with the same shape.

title: AgentAudit — Recursive Documentation
content: backend/services/agent_audit.py implements PHASE 2.3 of the QGTNL protocol: every agentic action emits a JSON entry to encyclopedia/agent_audit.jsonl (configurable via AGENT_AUDIT_PATH). When AGENT_AUDIT_FORWARD=True (default), entries are also fire-and-forget POSTed to {MAPPING_HUB_URL}/v1/ingest for the Librarian's continuous learning. Network/file failures are logged and never break the calling action. Entry shape: {ts, node, actor, action, status, payload}. Currently wired into POST /strike and POST /start/{symbol} and the lifespan exchange initialisation.

title: FastAPI Lifespan Handler
content: backend/main.py defines an asynccontextmanager lifespan that initialises ExchangeService (with safe partial-init shutdown), OMS, and StrategyLogic into app.state on startup. Each init step is wrapped in try/except so a missing optional dependency or a network failure cannot crash the whole app. On shutdown, the exchange is closed cleanly via app.state.exchange_service.shutdown(). This unblocks the trade and strategy routers.

title: Trade and Strategy Endpoints
content: POST /trade/order (JWT) places an order via OMS with symbol pattern validation (^[A-Z0-9]+/USDT$), positive amount, market/limit type, and risk clamp via MAX_ORDER_NOTIONAL. GET /strategy/analyze/{symbol}?strategy=p25_momentum (JWT) fetches OHLCV from MEXC and runs the named strategy from backend/services/strategies.py (p25_momentum or golden_cross). Returns signal (BUY/SELL/HOLD), candles_evaluated, and last 5 rows.

title: Session 2 Changes (2026-04-19)
content: Session 2 hardening pass: (1) Added FastAPI lifespan that initialises ExchangeService, OMS, StrategyLogic into app.state. (2) Mounted trade and strategy routers with import guards. (3) Fixed strategy.py router to use real StrategyLogic methods (was calling non-existent StrategyEngine.calculate_indicators). (4) Added standardised GET /v1/system/status endpoint per PHASE 2.2 QGTNL protocol. (5) Created AgentAudit service for PHASE 2.3 recursive documentation, wired into /strike, /start/{symbol}, and exchange init. (6) Fixed __main__ port from 8000 to 10000 to match Dockerfile/HF Space. (7) Added 9 new unit tests; all 161 tests pass.
